description: A traveler wants to book two first-class train tickets from Paris to Amsterdam.

nodes.task_description: Search for available trains from Paris to Amsterdam on the desired date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds several train options with first-class availability.

nodes.task_description: Select the desired train and provide the total price for two first-class tickets.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the selection and total cost.

nodes.task_description: Book the train tickets and issue them to the traveler.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully books the tickets and provides a booking reference.
